race.name: Craft Ski Marathon
race.tagline: The Swedish season opener at Gronklitt — first tracks of winter on one of Dalarna's finest trail networks.

vitals.aid_stations: Multiple aid stations along the course

climate.description: Gronklitt in Dalarna provides reliable mid-winter conditions in January. Temperatures typically range from -15°C to -5°C. As a season opener, cold and dark conditions are the norm.
challenges: Early season race — limited daylight in January
Skiers may be early in their season fitness
Wax selection in consistently cold conditions

course.primary: A 42km classic course at Gronklitt, one of Sweden's most respected cross-country skiing destinations. Rolling forested terrain through the Dalarna landscape.
course.surface: Machine-groomed classic tracks on established trail network
features: Season opener for Swedish recreational skiers
One of Sweden's premier XC skiing destinations

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: A well-organized season opener at a premier Swedish skiing venue. Ski Classics Challengers and 'The Originals' membership provides some prestige, but early-season timing and modest field limit the overall score.

history.summary: The Craft Ski Marathon emerged in the early 2000s at Gronklitt, one of Sweden's most established cross-country skiing destinations near Orsa in Dalarna. It serves as the season opener for many Swedish recreational long-distance skiers and is part of both the Ski Classics Challengers circuit and the Svenska Langlopscupen 'The Originals' series.
notable_facts: Season opener for the Swedish long-distance ski calendar
Held at Gronklitt, one of Sweden's most respected XC skiing venues
Located in Dalarna, Sweden's heartland of cross-country skiing

youtube_data.search_query: Craft Ski Marathon cross country ski race Gronklitt

videos.title: Craft Ski Marathon 2026 in Orsa Grönklitt 🇸🇪 | Race Day, Gear Setup & Travel Vlog
videos.description:
On January 11, 2026, I took part in the incredible Craft Ski Marathon in Orsa Grönklitt, Sweden 🇸🇪❄️
In this video, I’m taking you behind the scenes of my full race experience — from travel preparations to the starting line and all the way to the finish.
🎿 In this video you’ll see:
• What I pack for a ski marathon
• How I dress for cold race conditions
• My full race-day setup
• Travel footage to Orsa Grönklitt
• Highlights from the Craft Ski Marathon course
• My race experience and impressions
The Craft Ski Marathon in Orsa Grönklitt is one of Sweden’s most scenic cross-country ski events, offering stunning winter landscapes and perfectly prepared tracks. It’s always a special experience to race in such beautiful surroundings.
If you're preparing for your own cross-country ski race, looking for gear inspiration, or just enjoy ski racing content — this one is for you!
Let me know in the comments:
Have you ever raced in Sweden? What’s your favorite ski marathon?
👍 Like & subscribe for more ski racing and endurance sports content!
#CraftSkiMarathon #OrsaGrönklitt #CrossCountrySkiing #SkiRace #SkiMarathon #RaceVlog #WinterSports #SkiGear
